title: melinis repens subsp. repens
intro: Melinis repens subsp. repens, also known as buffalo grass or thatching grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Africa and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Melinis repens subsp. repens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused into a decoction, which is then used to treat various ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin irritations.
